path.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color-secondary, var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor)); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-secondary-m, var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1)));
fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));

line.style: fill: var(--icon-fill-secondary, white); stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));

circle.style: fill: none; stroke: var(--icon-stroke-color, currentColor); stroke-miterlimit: 10; stroke-width:var(--icon-stroke-width-m, calc(var(--icon-stroke-width, 5) * 1));
